final_text:
Both statsmodels and sklearn give the same AIC.

The logistic regression model fits the binary outcome `Efficacy_PR` (1 = PR; 0 = PD or SD) on BMI alone, using the 80 complete cases (41 observations were missing BMI). The fitted model converges (`coef_BMI = 0.168`, `p = 0.087`) with a log-likelihood of −53.906.

FINAL ANSWER: 111.81
